data.title: Alibaba's cross-border business plans to launch an AI subscription service and test a stablecoin-like payment solution.
data.description: Alibaba Group's cross-border e-commerce division is planning to launch an AI-based subscription service and partner with JPMorgan Chase to test a "stablecoin-like" payment method to improve the efficiency of cross-border settlements. The report indicates that this payment tool may be used for international trade and service transactions, aiming to reduce uncertainty caused by exchange rate fluctuations and shorten settlement times. (CNBC)

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum ETFs Shed Over $1 Billion in Assets as XRP Fund Soars
data.description:
BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin Trust totaled more than a quarter billion in investments, in the worst day of Bitcoin ETF outflows since February.
source: https://decrypt.co/348651/bitcoin-ethereum-etfs-shed-1-billion-assets-xrp-fund-soars

data.title: Solana Drops to $142: What to Expect Next?
data.description:
Solana (SOL) has fallen to $142. 3, extending its weekly decline to 9% as risk-off sentiment grips the broader crypto market. Market cap has slipped to $78. 88 billion, while trading volume jumped 34%, signaling aggressive repositioning rather than an illiquid decline
source: https://www.ethnews.com/solana-drops-to-142-what-to-expect-next/

data.title: An address that had held ETH for over four years sold 2,404 ETH, cashing out approximately $7.7 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, address 0x0c19… just sold 2,404 ETH that it had held for over 4 years, for approximately $7.7 million. This address initially bought the aforementioned ETH on August 25, 2021, at a price of approximately $3,190, and the current ETH price has fallen back to near its original cost basis.

data.title: Yi Lihua: Now is the best time to buy spot stocks at the bottom; market panic actually provides a better opportunity.
data.description: Yi Lihua, founder of Liquid Capital (formerly LDCapital), posted on the X platform that market panic has reached its peak today. He understands the market's focus on the "four-year cycle" and technical indicators such as daily, weekly, and yearly charts, but still maintains that the current period is a good time to buy spot stocks and is optimistic about the future market. He emphasized that it is more important to remain greedy when others are panicking. Even if you have been right ten times before, it does not guarantee that you will be right again. Investment and trading should always follow your own logic, and your sharing and operations should not be swayed by short-term information. He pointed out that the crypto market is highly volatile, and it has only been a little over a month since the peak. With negative factors gradually being released, buying is usually better than selling.

data.title: Cardano Drops Below $0.60 as Selling Pressure Intensifies: Is $0.50 the Next Target?
data.description:
Cardano (ADA) is under heavy pressure in today’s session, falling more than 8% and trading near $0. 520. The move mirrors a broader altcoin selloff, with BNB, XRP, and others sliding as traders rotate out of higher-beta assets. Market sentiment remains fragile across the board, with the 24-hour volume rising almost 49% as volatility spikes, while […] The post Cardano Drops Below $0
source: https://www.ethnews.com/cardano-drops-below-0-60-as-selling-pressure-intensifies-is-0-50-the-next-target/

data.title: Bitcoin Maximalism Is Fading As Top Altcoins Like PEPENODE Rise
data.description:
What to Know: Bitcoin’s ETF-driven evolution into digital gold is softening strict maximalism and encouraging more diversified crypto portfolios. Capital is rotating into top altcoins with real narratives, especially in infrastructure, AI and DePIN rather than pure speculation. PEPENODE mixes meme culture with gamified virtual mining and multi token rewards to keep holders engaged. For most of crypto’s history the script was simple: own Bitcoin, ignore everything else
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin-maximalism-fading-top-altcoins-pepenode-rise/

data.title: Binance Launches Coffee Missions with USDT Rewards for MENA Traders
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is introducing a new initiative called Coffee Missions, aimed at rewarding traders from selected MENA countries. The activity, which runs from 2025-11-13 13:00 (UTC) to 2025-12-13 19:59 (UTC), invites Regular and VIP 1-3 users to participate in daily crypto tasks across Spot, Futures, and Convert trades, as well as making deposits. Participants can earn points and climb the ranks to unlock rewards, with top traders eligible for bonus USDT token vouchers.

To join the Coffee Missions, users must log in to their Binance account and visit the activity page to click “Join Now.” Tasks completed during the activity period will earn points, and the top 800 users by total points will receive a 40 USDT token voucher each. Additionally, the top 200 Earn Stakers, who must complete all tasks, will also receive a 40 USDT token voucher. Tasks include completing Spot trades of at least 50 USDT equivalent, Futures trades of at least 100 USDT equivalent, Convert trades of at least 50 USDT equivalent, and making fiat or crypto deposits of at least 50 USDT equivalent. Earn Staking requires staking on Binance Simple Earn Flexible USDT for 14 days during the campaign period, with a minimum stake of 100 USDT equivalent.

Important notes include the requirement for users to complete account verification (KYC), and each task can be completed once per day unless otherwise stated. Rewards will be distributed as USDT token vouchers within 30 working days after the campaign ends, with vouchers remaining valid for 30 days after distribution. Binance reserves the right to disqualify users for dishonest behavior or interference with program code, and may amend the Activity Terms at its discretion.

data.title: Binance will launch spot trading pairs such as ACM/TRY and open its trading robot service.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance will launch the ACM/TRY, DODO/TRY, HEI/TRY, and XTZ/TRY spot trading pairs on November 26, 2025 at 12:00 (UTC), and will simultaneously open its algorithmic order book trading bot service for these pairs. (This news item was generated with AI assistance.)

data.title: Off-exchange institutions bought 9,945 ETH, and at one point made a profit of over $94 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, an off-exchange institution/whale address recently purchased 9,945 ETH from FalconX, Wintertermute, and Coinbase, worth approximately $31.89 million. On-chain records show that this institution had previously realized profits exceeding $94 million through multiple ETH swing trading operations.

data.title: A borrower who had taken out a long position in WBTC had their account liquidated, with the liquidation amount reaching $6.67 million.
data.description: According to PyShield monitoring, when Bitcoin fell below $100,000, the address 0xceef...ba42 was liquidated on Compound for holding a long position in WBTC. This address had previously used WBTC as collateral to borrow USDT and DAI, ultimately resulting in a total liquidation amount of $6.67 million.
